title: Users in North America may be unable to access Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)
impact: Users may have been unable to access Copilot.

updates.content:
Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Copilot and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users may be unable to access Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)

User impact: Users may be unable to access Copilot.

More info: Users may be unable to access Copilot through Office.com or in the app directly. 
 
Current status: We're analyzing internal telemetry and recent service updates to identify what is leading to impact. 
 
Scope of impact: Users located in North America who are attempting to access Copilot may be impacted. 
 
Next update by: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 6:00 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to access Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)

User impact: Users may be unable to access Copilot.

More info: Users may be unable to access Copilot through Office.com or in the app directly. 
 
Current status: We’ve determined a portion of our infrastructure in North America is utilizing a high number of resources, resulting in impact. We're rebalancing traffic across healthy infrastructure to remediate the issue.  

Scope of impact: Users located in North America who are attempting to access Copilot may be impacted. 
 
Start time: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 3:28 PM UTC 

Preliminary root cause: A portion of our North American Copilot infrastructure is experiencing high resource utilization, resulting in impact.

Next update by: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 7:00 PM UTC

We rebalanced traffic to mitigate the issue; however, after monitoring service health, we determined this did not fully resolve impact. We're adding resources to the affected infrastructure and are observing positive signals in service health telemetry. 

This quick update is designed to give the latest information on this issue.

Title: Users in North America may be unable to access Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)

User impact: Users may have been unable to access Copilot.

More info: Users may have been unable to access Copilot through Office.com or in the app directly. 

Final status: After a period of monitoring, we confirmed that our actions to rebalance traffic and add resources have resolved the issue.
 
Scope of impact: Users located in North America who were attempting to access Copilot may have been impacted. 

Start time: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 3:28 PM UTC
 
End time: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 6:03 PM UTC
 
Preliminary root cause: A portion of our North American Copilot infrastructure experienced high resource utilization, resulting in impact.
 
Next steps: 
-We're continuing to investigate additional optimizations we can apply to Copilot infrastructure to ensure smooth traffic-handling in the future. 
 
We'll provide a preliminary Post-Incident Report within two business days and a final Post-Incident Report within five business days.
